questionHtml:
What is the preferred IUPAC name of the structure shown?


A.  2-ethyl-3-methylbutan-1-ol

B.  2,3-dimethylbutan-2-ol

C.  1-ethyl-2-methylpropan-1-ol

D.  1,1,2-trimethylpropan-1-ol
